name: ai-smell
description: Reduces AI臭 (the telltale smell of AI-generated Japanese prose) in documents and articles: a PreToolUse hook that nudges before writing *.md, a mechanical fixed-phrase hook that flags known AI-tell phrases after writing, an occasional project-wide audit skill for the semantic issues the dictionary can't catch (absence of a writer's stance, structural monotony, formulaic paraphrases), and writer skills for technical docs and blog-style articles.
